/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libtest_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/test_interface/msg/obj_position__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/test_interface/msg/resnet_msg__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/test_interface/msg/video_log_msg__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/test_interface/msg/object_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/userdata/dev_ws/build/test_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
